assertions.evidence: A markdown table with columns Scenario, Shipping type, Order value, Destination, Shipping cost? is present

assertions.text: Destination/country is blank (or absent from the table) for standard and express shipping rows — not filled with a dummy value or 'ANY'
assertions.evidence: Standard rows: '| Standard      | £10.00      |             | £3.99' and '| Standard      | £100.00     |             | £3.99' — Destination cells are blank. Express rows similarly have blank Destination cells.

assertions.text: Overnight rows include an explicit UK destination value (not blank), since availability depends on it
assertions.evidence: Overnight row: '| Overnight     | £20.00      | UK          | £14.99' — Destination is explicitly 'UK'

assertions.text: At least one output column ends with '?'
Table includes rows for all three shipping types: standard, express, and overnight
assertions.evidence: Rows present for: 'Standard' (2 rows), 'Express' (3 rows), 'Overnight' (1 row)
